title: The End Void Rings Generation Fix
description: Fabric mod for Minecraft with fix bug in world generation of The End dimension
body:
**This mod was created to fix the old bug called "Rings of the Void" in the End dimension generation.**

**"Rings of the Void"** are giant rings of territories without blocks which start since **370720th** block from central coordinates. 

![Generation bug without mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdba866488863ffd6a000e9db684214a624e88f1_0.webp)
![Fixed generation with Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c26e5909df496815f5c67cc9c35db8bc0215cc4_0.webp)
